_addons.label: Gutter wrap upgrade — main + lower porch
_addons.description: Replace existing gutters with new 6-inch continuous aluminum, hidden hangers, downspouts, color-matched. ~148 linear feet wrapping main + lower porch.

_addons.label: Performance Shell — Vinyl siding package
_addons.description: Full exterior wrap. Strip + inspect, OSB substrate where needed, housewrap, premium vinyl siding, soffit, fascia, gutters. 10-yr workmanship.

_addons.label: Performance Shell — Hardie fiber cement (Premium)
_addons.description: Full wall assembly upgrade. OSB + Tyvek DrainWrap + VentiGrid rainscreen + HardiePlank lap siding. 15-yr workmanship. (VentiGrid included.)

_addons.label: Performance Shell — Steel siding (Designer)
_addons.description: Industrial-grade exterior. OSB + Tyvek + VentiGrid + steel panel cladding. Low maintenance, 50+ yr lifespan. 15-yr workmanship. (VentiGrid included.)

_addons.label: Add EPS rigid foam insulation
_addons.description: 1.5" continuous EPS foam under the wall assembly — boosts R-value by R-6 across the whole envelope, drastically reduces thermal bridging. Layers under any Performance Shell tier above.

_addons.label: Add VentiGrid rainscreen (vinyl shell only)
_addons.description: Vertical rainscreen channel system behind the cladding — drains incidental water, reduces mold/rot risk, extends siding life 10-15 years. (Already included on Hardie + Steel tiers.)

notes.text: Site visit measurements. Main building 24x27, 8/12 pitch, 2 stories. Lower porch 13x10, 8/12 pitch, 1 story (also being re-roofed - the current shingles need replacement). Additional small sun-porch already metal-roofed and excluded from scope. Hipped roof structure: 110 LF hips total, 10 LF ridge, 0 valleys (porch tied off separately). 1 small chimney. 17 windows. ~20 ft wall flashing main + ~10-12 ft on porch return = 30 LF walls. Gutters wrap main + lower porch (~148 LF perimeter). 44.3 km from Moncton (Day Trip pricing band).
notes.author: system

notes.text: Pricing scaffolding. Metal tiers (Standard $23,632.50 / Enhanced $26,335 / Premium $38,323.75 HST-incl) calculated via Ryujin quote engine v3.1 against measurements above. Performance Shell tiers from offer catalog (Vinyl $49,737.50 / Hardie $83,547.50 / Steel $75,900 HST-incl). EPS foam $3,000 + VentiGrid $4,000 + Gutter wrap $3,500 are CONTRACTOR ESTIMATES — confirm with Mac before sending live. Customer will see metal tiers as primary, all six upgrades as toggleable add-ons.
notes.author: system

notes.text: Sales context: Michele asked for metal. Mac wants to also surface Performance Shell + foam + VentiGrid as optional upgrades since gutters are visibly rough and a full exterior story is on the table. Customer can mix-and-match in the proposal client.
notes.author: system
